name: detectConsensus
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.totalVotes === undefined || typeof output.result.status === 'string'
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data (CollabActionPanel.actConsensus channel: runDomain → {input:{artifact:{data}}} peeled at dispatch). Empty votes → { message } empty-shape. Else tally by (v.position||v.vote||'abstain'); leadingPosition = highest tally; consensusPercent = round(topCount/total*100); hasConsensus = ≥67; hasSupermajority = ≥75; status = strong-consensus / consensus-reached / simple-majority (≥50) / no-consensus; dissenting = the non-leading positions with {position,count,percent}. No numeric input parsing (positions are labels — a numeric-looking '42' stays a string bucket, never coerced), so there is no parseFloat poison surface here. Result card renders status/totalVotes/consensusPercent/leadingPosition/hasConsensus/hasSupermajority/dissenting[].{position,count,percent} EXACTLY (verified field-for-field against CollabActionPanel.tsx 2026-06-28).
